Title: User logs in successfully
Test Steps:
1. User enters username and password.
2. User clicks on the login button.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and redirected to the main menu.

Title: Admin logs in successfully
Test Steps:
1. Admin enters username and password.
2. Admin clicks on the login button.
Expected Result: Admin is logged in successfully and redirected to the main menu.

Title: User logs in with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. User enters incorrect username and password.
2. User clicks on the login button.
Expected Result: Error message is displayed indicating incorrect credentials.

Title: Admin logs in with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. Admin enters incorrect username and password.
2. Admin clicks on the login button.
Expected Result: Error message is displayed indicating incorrect credentials.

Title: User logs out successfully
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the logout option.
2. User clicks on the logout button.
Expected Result: User is logged out successfully and redirected to the login page.

Title: Admin logs out successfully
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the logout option.
2. Admin clicks on the logout button.
Expected Result: Admin is logged out successfully and redirected to the login page.

Title: User registers successfully
Test Steps:
1. Main actor initiates user creation.
2. User provides registration details.
3. User submits the registration form.
4. User data is saved in the database.
Expected Result: User is registered successfully and a confirmation message is displayed.

Title: User registration fails due to existing username
Test Steps:
1. Main actor initiates user creation.
2. User provides registration details.
3. User submits the registration form.
Expected Result: Error message is displayed indicating that the username is already taken.

Title: User navigates through menu options
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the menu option.
2. User navigates to the profile page.
3. User navigates to the activities page.
4. User navigates back to the menu.
Expected Result: User successfully navigates through the menu options and views the respective pages.

Title: User navigates to logout from profile page
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the menu option.
2. User navigates to the profile page.
3. User clicks on the logout option.
Expected Result: User is logged out successfully and redirected to the login page.

Title: User creates an announcement
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the create announcement option.
2. User fills in the announcement details.
3. User submits the announcement.
Expected Result: Announcement is created successfully and displayed on the noticeboard.

Title: User modifies an announcement
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the modify announcement option.
2. User updates the announcement details.
3. User submits the modified announcement.
Expected Result: Announcement is updated successfully and the changes are reflected on the noticeboard.

Title: User accepts an announcement
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the accept announcement option.
2. User confirms the acceptance.
Expected Result: Announcement status is changed to accepted and marked as in progress.

Title: User removes an announcement
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the remove announcement option.
2. User confirms the removal.
Expected Result: Announcement is removed successfully and no longer appears on the noticeboard.

Title: User assigns points to an announcement
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the assign points option.
2. User specifies the point value.
3. User submits the point assignment.
Expected Result: Points are assigned successfully to the announcement.

Title: User modifies account details
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the menu option.
2. User navigates to the profile page.
3. User clicks on the modify account option.
4. User updates the account details.
5. User submits the modifications.
Expected Result: Account details are updated successfully and the changes are reflected on the profile page.

Title: User donates points
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the menu option.
2. User navigates to the profile page.
3. User clicks on the points donation option.
4. User specifies the point value.
5. User submits the donation.
Expected Result: Points are donated successfully and the balance is updated on the profile page.

Title: User views noticeboard
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the view noticeboard option.
2. User views the noticeboard content.
Expected Result: Noticeboard content is displayed successfully.

Title: User lists noticeboard items with filter
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the list with filter option.
2. User applies a filter to the noticeboard items.
3. User views the filtered noticeboard items.
Expected Result: Filtered noticeboard items are displayed successfully.

Title: User lists noticeboard items without filter
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the list no filter option.
2. User views the unfiltered noticeboard items.
Expected Result: Unfiltered noticeboard items are displayed successfully.

Title: User views detailed noticeboard items with filter
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the list with filter option.
2. User applies a filter to the noticeboard items.
3. User clicks on a detailed view of a filtered noticeboard item.
4. User views the detailed noticeboard item.
Expected Result: Detailed view of the filtered noticeboard item is displayed successfully.

Title: User views detailed noticeboard items without filter
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the list no filter option.
2. User views the unfiltered noticeboard items.
3. User clicks on a detailed view of an unfiltered noticeboard item.
4. User views the detailed noticeboard item.
Expected Result: Detailed view of the unfiltered noticeboard item is displayed successfully.

Title: User data is saved in the database
Test Steps:
1. User performs an action that requires data to be saved in the database.
2. User data is sent to the database for storage.
Expected Result: User data is successfully saved in the database.

Title: Announcement data is saved in the database
Test Steps:
1. User creates an announcement.
2. Announcement data is sent to the database for storage.
Expected Result: Announcement data is successfully saved in the database.

Title: Noticeboard data is saved in the database
Test Steps:
1. User views a noticeboard.
2. Noticeboard data is sent to the database for storage.
Expected Result: Noticeboard data is successfully saved in the database.

Title: User data is retrieved from the database
Preconditions: User data exists in the database
Test Steps:
1. User requests data retrieval from the database.
2. User data is fetched from the database.
Expected Result: User data is successfully retrieved from the database.

Title: Announcement data is retrieved from the database
Preconditions: Announcement data exists in the database
Test Steps:
1. User requests data retrieval from the database.
2. Announcement data is fetched from the database.
Expected Result: Announcement data is successfully retrieved from the database.

Title: Noticeboard data is retrieved from the database
Preconditions: Noticeboard data exists in the database
Test Steps:
1. User requests data retrieval from the database.
2. Noticeboard data is fetched from the database.
Expected Result: Noticeboard data is successfully retrieved from the database.

Title: User interacts with main system
Test Steps:
1. User interacts with the main system.
2. User's actions are processed by the main system.
3. Main system communicates with the database as required.
